name: clify
description: Generate A+ Node.js CLIs from API documentation. Copies a hand-crafted exemplar, mechanically substitutes API-specific content, and verifies via a deterministic validation gate.

interface.shortDescription: Generate verified Node.js CLIs from API docs
interface.longDescription: clify generates high-quality Node.js CLIs from API documentation by copying a proven exemplar, adapting resources/actions, preserving auth and test contracts, and validating the generated repo with deterministic gates.
defaultPrompt: Generate a CLI from these API docs
